title: PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial assistance up to $50 to help cover the cost of prescriptions. Only able to assist with narcotic pain medications if accompanied by antibiotics. Prescriptions must be filled at the Safeway Pharmacy (12th and Center Street). All funding is first-come, first-served. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 391-4365 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 391-4365 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Written prescription, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Salvation Army building. Services: Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATE AND OREGON ID CARD ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - LOCAL BUS PASS ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE
